title: agathis macrophylla
intro: Agathis macrophylla, also known as the Kauri or Agathis tree, is a large evergreen coniferous tree native to Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Agathis macrophylla lie in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Agathis macrophylla include its essential oil, which can be extracted through steam distillation, and its resin, which is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
